task_completion.description: Verify the creation or upload of the lookup table file named 'http_status.csv'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the Splunk 'Lookup table files' settings page with 'http_status.csv' listed, or a view of the file being created/uploaded with columns 'status', 'status_description', and 'status_type'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the lookup definition named 'http_status_def'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the Splunk 'Lookup definitions' page showing 'http_status_def' configured to use the 'http_status.csv' file in the 'search' app context.

task_completion.description: Verify the configuration of the automatic lookup for the target sourcetype.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the Splunk 'Automatic lookups' page showing a configuration applied to the 'access_combined_wcookie' sourcetype, matching the 'status' field and outputting 'status_description' and 'status_type'.

task_completion.description: Verify the execution of the search query utilizing the automatic lookup fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the Splunk Search interface showing a query searching the 'tutorial' index and using '| stats count by status_description, status_type', with a data table showing aggregated counts.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the saved search named 'Web_Status_Summary'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the 'Save As Report' dialog confirming the name 'Web_Status_Summary', or the Splunk 'Reports' / 'Searches, Reports, and Alerts' page listing 'Web_Status_Summary'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual Splunk Web UI to configure the lookups and searches.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Splunk Web interface (typically at localhost:8000) with standard Splunk navigation menus, rather than just terminal curl commands or text editors.

integrity.description: Ensure the search results are genuinely generated by Splunk.
integrity.visual_evidence: The search results should appear in the standard Splunk data table format within the Search & Reporting app, complete with job status indicators (e.g., green checkmark, event counts).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually used an automatic lookup rather than manually invoking the lookup command in the search bar.
integrity.visual_evidence: The search query shown in the Splunk UI must NOT contain the explicit '| lookup' command. It should only contain the base search and the '| stats' command, proving the automatic lookup is functioning.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected lookup definition name is 'http_status_def'. The target sourcetype for the automatic lookup is 'access_combined_wcookie'. The target index is 'tutorial'. The expected saved search/report name is 'Web_Status_Summary'.
